occurrence_sentence: The video was aired on state-owned China Central Television last year.

interaction_phrase: during an interview with state-owned China Central Television
occurrence_sentence: The disclosure, made during an interview with state-owned China Central Television (CCTV) last year and now available online, has offered an unprecedented view into the intricate process of quantum chip production, the news organization points out.

interaction_phrase: during an interview with state-owned China Central Television
occurrence_sentence: The disclosure, made during an interview with state-owned China Central Television (CCTV) last year and now available online, has offered an unprecedented view into the intricate process of quantum chip production, the news organization points out.

[Asia Times is reporting](https://asiatimes.com/2024/01/china-makes-quantum-chips-with-foreign-machines/#:~:text=Foreign%20suppliers,later%20as%20a%20contract%20manufacturer.) that a recently surfaced video shows that Origin Quantum, a pioneer in quantum computing, has disclosed the details of its production line, underscoring the substantial reliance on foreign technology in its production.

interaction_phrase: Origin Quantum, a pioneer in quantum computing, has disclosed
occurrence_sentence: Asia Times is reporting that a recently surfaced video shows that Origin Quantum, a pioneer in quantum computing, has disclosed the details of its production line, underscoring the substantial reliance on foreign technology in its production.

interaction_phrase: during an interview with state-owned China Central Television
occurrence_sentence: The disclosure, made during an interview with state-owned China Central Television (CCTV) last year and now available online, has offered an unprecedented view into the intricate process of quantum chip production, the news organization points out.

interaction_phrase: backed by US venture capital firm Sequoia Capital
occurrence_sentence: Next, the chip undergoes a coating and oxidation process in a machine crafted by Yuomao Technology, a Xiamen-based firm founded in 2018. Interestingly, Yuomao Technology was backed by US venture capital firm Sequoia Capital.
Interestingly, Yuomao Technology was backed by US venture capital firm Sequoia Capital.

Origin Quantum has complemented this with its own innovations, including China's first non-destructive probe electrical measurement platform and a laser annealer, significantly enhancing efficiency and chip yield, the video points out.

It's also important to point out that this may not reveal China's reliance on global technology for its quantum computing programs, rather it simply points out that all quantum computing development will rest on a complex global supply chain.

interaction_phrase: China's first non-destructive probe electrical measurement platform

occurrence_sentence: Asia Times reports that, as of now, SÜSS MicroTec, Yuomao Technology, and Real RTP have not commented on whether their machines in China incorporate US or Japanese components.
